title: Atlas does not resell platform access
claimText: Atlas sells configuration, guidance, onboarding, workflow design, proof, and support around platform use. It does not publicly position launch offers as platform resale.

title: Atlas does not claim custom foundation-model development
claimText: Atlas should not frame public launch offers as custom foundation-model development. Public wording should stay within tailored configuration, onboarding, governance, proof, and support.

title: Public launch boundary is ChatGPT-first
claimText: The public launch is limited to ChatGPT-oriented offers and workflows. Gemini and secure-mode structures remain prepared but are not exposed as current public dependencies.

title: Approved wording only
claimText: Public compliance, privacy, and trust wording must remain inside an approved-claims discipline so the site does not drift into unsupported or overconfident claims.
